allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, glob sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\) import pdfplumber files = glob.glob\('C:/Users/Peter/Downloads/Documents/*Garcia*'\) path = files[0] with pdfplumber.open\(path\) as pdf: print\(f'GARCIA: {len\(pdf.pages\)} pages'\) for i, page in enumerate\(pdf.pages\): try: text = page.extract_text\(\) if text and len\(text.strip\(\)\) > 80: print\(f'=== P{i+1} ==='\) print\(text[:1600]\) except: pass ")
